question: How many bikes did I service or plan to service in March?
prediction: 1 bike serviced (road bike on March 10), 1 bike planned for service (commuter bike front tire replacement before April).
reasoning_summary: Two memories confirm road bike serviced on March 10. One memory states plan to replace commuter bike front tire before April. Chain cleaning on March 2 and March 22 are maintenance, not service. Other memories are unrelated.
judge_reason: Prediction matches reference answer of 2 bikes (1 serviced + 1 planned).
